items.title: Rare Arctic Bobtail Squid Filmed in Its Natural Habitat for the First Time
items.summary: Scientists have filmed the Arctic bobtail squid in its natural subzero habitat for the first time, including the rare discovery of a mature female tending to its eggs. [Read More]

items.title: David Hockney’s Endless Scroll
items.summary: The late artist’s digital paintings at Serpentine, Tate gets a new director, beyond the myth of Brazilian modernist Chico da Silva, and more.

items.title: SoundCloud Acquires What’s Left of Nina Protocol
items.summary: The streaming service will preserve Nina Protocol’s editorial archive and allow artists to opt into its creator ecosystem

items.title: Protesters Decry Chinatown Museum’s Acceptance of “Jail Money” at Town Hall
items.summary: Leaders of New York’s Museum of Chinese failed to persuade protesters that a $35 million grant from the city was not tied to the construction of a borough jail.
